items.title: India to India Local ANI
items.description: Local ANI for India to India calls is not supported or provided

items.title: Fake Traffic Profiles
items.description: Generating or using fake traffic profiles is prohibited

items.title: Scam Traffic
items.description: Any form of scam traffic is strictly prohibited

items.title: F.E. | False Answer Traffic Profile
items.description: False answer (F.E.) traffic profiles are not allowed

items.title: AI Voice and Financial Content
items.description: AI-generated voice calls with financial content are not provided

items.title: Final Expense Insurance
items.description: Final expense insurance campaigns are not provided

items.title: Amazon
items.description: Amazon-related campaigns or impersonation calls are not provided

items.title: IVR / Press 1
items.description: IVR press-1 campaigns are not provided or supported

items.title: Forex / Crypto Investment Promotion
items.description: Forex and cryptocurrency investment promotion calls are prohibited

items.title: Duct Cleaning Campaigns
items.description: Duct cleaning telemarketing campaigns are not provided

items.title: Tax Scam Calls / IRS
items.description: IRS impersonation and tax scam calls are illegal under federal law

items.title: Social Security Scam (SSA Scam)
items.description: Social Security Administration impersonation scam calls are illegal

items.title: Tech Support Scam
items.description: Tech support scam calls pretending to be from Microsoft, Apple, etc. are prohibited

items.title: Warranty / Auto Warranty Robocalls
items.description: Extended warranty and auto warranty robocalls are prohibited

items.title: Loan / Debt Relief Scam
items.description: Loan and debt relief scam calls are prohibited

items.title: Lottery / Prize Scam
items.description: Lottery and prize notification scam calls are prohibited

items.title: Mobile Selling
items.description: Mobile phone selling campaigns are not provided

items.title: USA CLI
items.description: USA CLI routes are not in our active routing portfolio

items.title: USA IVR
items.description: USA IVR services are not in our active service portfolio
